issue.title: Design: GSAP scroll-triggered animation spec — cards fade in, numbers count up, sections slide in
issue.description: Add GSAP scroll-triggered animations throughout the homepage. Cards fade in on scroll, stat numbers count up, sections slide in. Must be lightweight — no heavy 3D libraries. Mobile performance is critical (most traffic will be phone users). Spec which elements get which animations, easing curves, durations, stagger timing.

goal.title: AI-operated personality intelligence platform. One free test, four frameworks (Strengths, 16 Personalities, DISC, Enneagram), personalized growth paths. $3M ARR in 12 months with zero human employees.
